name: City Rush Arena
description: Singapore CBD intersection at night: wet asphalt, crosswalk stripes, stacked headlights, taxi-amber streaks, glass towers lit with surge-colored glow and ERP signage hints—compressed depth, peak-hour electricity.
promptTemplate: Cinematic wide-angle night view of Singapore CBD as a compact 16-bit pixel battle stage: shallow isometric raised traffic platform, charcoal asphalt with dashed arrows and reflective studs, yellow-black curb trim, receding bus lanes and skyline bands, teal and taxi-yellow highlights, readable midground for combat, no logos, no text.
